title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Deleting devices
scenario: Device list correctly removes deleted device while preserving connected/disconnected state of remaining paired devices
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Pair and connect at least 3 Poly Bluetooth audio devices to the app.
3. Power off 2 of the 3 connected devices.
4. On the Home screen, locate the device list.
5. Delete one device from the device list (e.g., swipe to delete or use the delete/remove option).
6. Verify the deleted device is no longer visible in the device list.
7. Verify the remaining devices are still present in the list with correct connected/disconnected status indicators.
8. Repeat the delete action for each remaining device in the list.
9. Verify that each remaining device can be successfully deleted from the list.
expected: The deleted device is properly removed from the device list. Remaining devices are still present with correct connected/disconnected state indicators. All remaining devices can be successfully deleted from the list.
